covered_report_window: Wednesday, June 24, 2026 after the U.S. market close, plus Thursday, June 25, 2026 before the U.S. market open.
market_context_summary: U.S. futures and large-cap tech were trying to stabilize after a two-day technology and semiconductor selloff. Micron is the main AI-memory event in the window; lower oil and gold amid improved Iran-peace optimism helped macro risk appetite, while crowded AI positioning and high earnings bars remained the key event risk.

ranked_companies.expected_driver: Gross billings and AI infrastructure demand
ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: A record Q1, upward estimate revisions, and AI/server distribution demand create the cleanest positive setup in the window.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Consensus is near $4.07-$4.12 EPS and $16.8B revenue, inside company Q2 EPS guidance of $3.75-$4.25 and revenue guidance of $16.1B-$16.9B.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Another gross-billings beat and constructive AI infrastructure commentary could validate a re-rating.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Thin margins, working-capital drag, or conservatism after a strong Q1 could cap the move.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Event is less crowded than MU or BB; positioning risk appears moderate.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Published consensus moved modestly upward into the print.
key_sources: TD SYNNEX IR June 25 release notice

ranked_companies.expected_driver: Q2 EBITDA margin and FY guidance
ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: The setup leans positive because guidance was raised after Q1 and Q2 expectations still leave room for margin execution to matter.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Analysts expect roughly $1.37-$1.38 EPS and about $924M revenue.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Low-single organic growth plus adhesive margin discipline could support a beat-and-maintain or beat-and-raise reaction.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Industrial demand softness or raw-material cost pressure could make the guidance look stretched.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Lower options/social intensity than mega-cap names; move likely tied to fundamentals.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Consensus sits near the upper half of management's Q2 EBITDA framing.
key_sources: H.B. Fuller Q1 2026 results and presentation

ranked_companies.key_risk_to_call: Consumer slowdown or labor/food cost tone
ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: LongHorn and Olive Garden traffic/comp momentum support a modest bullish setup, but guidance tone is the real bar.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Street EPS is around $3.63-$3.64 with revenue around $3.7B; Q3 comp sales were strong, led by LongHorn.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Healthy comps and a confident FY2027 outlook could extend the full-service dining leadership narrative.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Any value-consumer caution, margin pressure, or softer Olive Garden comp could reverse the move.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Moderate event risk; less speculative crowding than AI names.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Consensus implies more than 20% EPS growth versus the year-ago quarter.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Infrastructure-linked demand and high steel margins support the setup, but the prior EPS miss keeps conviction capped.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Consensus is about $1.72 EPS and $2.40B revenue.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Stable-to-better spreads plus TAG savings could drive relief.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Another margin or cost miss would make the recovery look uneven.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Cyclical beta raises macro sensitivity, but squeeze risk is not the main issue.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Estimate set is constructive but still digesting the mixed Q2 print.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Travel demand and revenue growth are supportive, but China ADR sentiment and margin quality keep the edge modest.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Previews show roughly $0.85-$0.91 EPS and $2.30B-$2.34B revenue, with investors focused on accommodations, transport, and international expansion.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Revenue acceleration with resilient margins could trigger relief.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: EPS miss, marketing spend, or weak outbound commentary could outweigh revenue growth.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: ADR sentiment and China macro can dominate company-specific results.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Longer-term EPS expectations have been revised upward in recent consensus summaries.
key_sources: Simply Wall St TCOM consensus update

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Acuity has a credible Intelligent Spaces growth story, but lighting softness and valuation discipline limit conviction.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Analysts expect about $5.16 EPS and $1.18B revenue.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: AIS momentum plus margin expansion could offset any lighting weakness.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Revenue miss in ABL or acquisition-integration questions could cap upside.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Positioning appears moderate; the key risk is fundamental mix.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Q2 beat EPS but missed revenue, so Q3 needs cleaner top-line evidence.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Fundamentals are exceptional, but the real market bar is a beat-and-raise with pristine HBM commentary, making reversal risk very high.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Published consensus clusters around $20-$21 EPS and $35B-$36B revenue, with options pricing a double-digit to roughly 17% move.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Stronger HBM supply, pricing, and guidance could revive the AI-memory trade.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: A merely good report, supply-normalization hints, or lower-than-whisper guide could sell off.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Options imply a very large move; Reddit and retail chatter are intense and polarized.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Targets and estimates rose sharply into the event after a huge stock run.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Margin recovery is encouraging, but organic volume evidence is not strong enough for a directional call.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Consensus is near $0.70 EPS and $1.9B revenue.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Volume improvement and continued cost savings could support a defensive relief move.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: If growth remains mostly pricing/acquisition-led, the stock may fade.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Lower event-volatility profile than growth names.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Company reaffirmed 2026 outlook after Q1, keeping the bar balanced.

ranked_companies.expected_driver: Investment banking revenue vs credit losses
ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Investment banking momentum is real, but private-credit and expense noise make the immediate reaction hard to handicap.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Previews cluster near $1.02-$1.09 EPS and about $2.2B revenue, with investment banking the key line.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Advisory and underwriting strength could offset credit concerns.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: New marks, expenses, or weak trading could dominate the headline.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Financial beta and deal-cycle sensitivity create two-way risk.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Analyst sentiment is mixed-to-positive but not clean enough for conviction.

ranked_companies.timing: Jun 24 after market close / Jun 25 call
ranked_companies.key_risk_to_call: Prior Q3 miss and steel volatility
ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Steel-spread leverage is interesting, but the prior miss and thinner evidence keep the setup neutral.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Market calendars place Q4 around Jun 24 with the company call on Jun 25.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Better direct spreads and automotive demand could help.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Revenue softness or inventory holding losses could pressure shares.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Coverage is thinner than larger peers; expectations are less reliable.
key_sources: Worthington Steel IR Q4 call event

ranked_companies.expected_driver: RV unit demand and dealer inventory
ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: RV demand and margin mix remain fragile, but expectations are low enough to create upside reversal risk.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Consensus is near $0.77-$0.78 EPS, with MarketBeat revenue near $756M.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Cost discipline and sequential demand stabilization could squeeze shorts.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Weak orders, margin compression, or cautious dealer commentary could weigh.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Cyclical consumer exposure makes macro tone important.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Street is cautious after prior RV-sector cuts and uneven demand.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Office furniture demand, margin pressure, and recent estimate cuts point down, but the lowered bar limits conviction.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Consensus is about $0.52 EPS and $974M revenue; analysts reportedly cut EPS estimates nearly 15% over three months.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Order improvement or better FY2027 guide could drive relief.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Soft contract demand or margin deleverage would confirm the bear case.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Lower liquidity but event sensitivity is meaningful.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Recent revisions are negative into the print.
key_sources: Simply Wall St MLKN estimate-cut note

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: The stock has already priced in a lot of QNX optimism, making a sell-the-news reaction more likely unless guidance is clearly stronger than whispered expectations.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Investor focus is on QNX growth, Secure Communications, positive cash flow, and the roughly $950M QNX backlog.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: A stronger FY2027 guide or cash-flow inflection could squeeze the stock higher.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Auto weakness, GEM execution risk, or merely in-line QNX results could disappoint.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: High retail attention and a large recent run make reversal risk very high.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Commentary is cautious after the sharp share-price move despite QNX optimism.

research_allocation_view.note: Research prioritization model only; not financial advice. Qualification required absolute direction score above 30, reversal risk 40 or below, sufficient confidence, and acceptable disparity.

detailed_company_sections.consensus_summary: All three passes leaned up; average score 44, reversal risk 36, disparity 10.
detailed_company_sections.final_judgment: Best positive setup because evidence quality and pass agreement were strongest.

detailed_company_sections.consensus_summary: All three passes leaned up; average score 35, reversal risk 38, disparity 12.
detailed_company_sections.final_judgment: Positive but not aggressive; margins and guidance quality are decisive.

detailed_company_sections.consensus_summary: All three passes leaned modestly up; average score 32, reversal risk 40, disparity 14.
detailed_company_sections.final_judgment: Qualified for allocation at the threshold; guidance tone can still flip the reaction.

detailed_company_sections.consensus_summary: Two passes leaned up and one was near neutral; average score 30, reversal risk 42, disparity 16.
detailed_company_sections.final_judgment: Not allocated because reversal risk and prior miss risk were too high.

detailed_company_sections.consensus_summary: Three passes leaned mildly up but with ADR/macro caution; average score 27, reversal risk 47, disparity 17.
Three passes leaned mildly up; average score 26, reversal risk 45, disparity 15.
detailed_company_sections.final_judgment: AIS story is constructive, but ABL softness limits conviction.

detailed_company_sections.consensus_summary: Passes agreed fundamentals are strong but differed on priced-in risk; average score 25, reversal risk 74, disparity 24.
detailed_company_sections.final_judgment: High-reversal-risk lean up, not a clean allocation candidate.

detailed_company_sections.consensus_summary: Passes clustered near neutral; average score 18, reversal risk 39, disparity 9.
detailed_company_sections.final_judgment: No edge because organic volume evidence is not strong enough.

detailed_company_sections.consensus_summary: Passes were mixed; average score 8, reversal risk 54, disparity 21.
detailed_company_sections.final_judgment: No edge due to credit-mark and expense uncertainty.

detailed_company_sections.consensus_summary: Passes were slightly negative to neutral; average score -6, reversal risk 52, disparity 18.
detailed_company_sections.final_judgment: No edge because timing/evidence quality and cyclicality reduce conviction.

detailed_company_sections.consensus_summary: All passes leaned down but flagged low-bar relief; average score -28, reversal risk 56, disparity 14.
detailed_company_sections.final_judgment: Bearish lean but not allocation-quality due to reversal risk.

detailed_company_sections.consensus_summary: All passes leaned down; average score -31, reversal risk 53, disparity 12.
detailed_company_sections.final_judgment: Negative setup, but estimate cuts reduce downside certainty.

detailed_company_sections.consensus_summary: All passes leaned down but flagged squeeze risk; average score -34, reversal risk 70, disparity 19.
detailed_company_sections.final_judgment: Best downside setup by score, but very high reversal risk prevents allocation.

disclaimer_text: This is research, not financial advice. Earnings reactions are highly uncertain and can be driven by market positioning, guidance, macro conditions, and management commentary rather than reported results alone.
